asset_groups.name: Wave graphic colorway variants
asset_groups.semantics: Two approved wave colorway families (Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each available in long and short variants; use approved color values only.

assets.description: Branded orange/yellow gradient PNG used as the full-width background for the Gradient Callout CTA section; sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning 600px content width. Do not re-host or recolor. Solid Sunshine #faa31b fallback fill required.

quotes: asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px)

assets.description: LISRAYA logo mark/icon; the logo icon's 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic). Placed at the lightest end of the masthead gradient.

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).
logo mark placed at the lightest end

assets.description: Fluid wave form in the Sunshine/Gold colorway, in long and short variants. Top wave layer at 70% transparency (Gold over Sunshine).

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Fluid wave form in the Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorway, in long and short variants. Top wave layer at 70% transparency (Sky Blue over Deep Blue).

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K ≈#ffe05c light gold, logo mark placed at the lightest end) — the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

assets.description: Brand Accent Shape — a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography. Applied radius large to one diagonal pair (default top-left + bottom-right), 6px to the other.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair.

assets.description: Warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Housed in the Accent shape. Every image requires descriptive alt text.

quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ).
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops

assets.description: Minimal line illustration icon set — consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work. Default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds; min render size 32×32px in email. New icons permitted but must match the style.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall.
minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds

assets.description: Internal-banner CTA shape and treatment SVG — rounded asymmetric path filled with a linear gradient from #FFDF55 (light gold) to #FAA21B (dark orange). Approved shape/treatment for CTAs.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

assets.description: White rounded-square icon badge (80px, inner icon ~48px) used in the Icon Callout Box; mirrors the accent shape at smaller scale (border-radius 20px 4px 20px 4px, 5:1) with a mandatory drop shadow (Dark Navy low opacity). Straddles the callout box's left edge.

quotes: Let `W` = badge width (use **80px**, icon ?48px inside).
The white badge **mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale**, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`
the white icon badge **must carry a subtle drop shadow**

subtypes.best_for: A full-width banner where a headline and a single button are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

quotes: Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

subtypes.name: Gradient Callout CTA Section

subtypes.best_for: Supporting 'proof point' statements (dosing convenience, time-to-effect, etc.) — a light-blue accent-shape box with a white icon badge straddling the box's left edge.

quotes: Icon Callout Box Rule
A **light-blue accent-shape box** containing a short blue headline, with a **white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge**
Used for supporting "proof point" statements (dosing convenience, time-to-effect, etc.).

subtypes.name: Icon Callout Box

quotes: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

templates.description: Approved plug-and-play MJML for the Gradient Callout CTA section: gradient PNG background with Sunshine fallback, centered Brand Blue headline (Nunito Sans 800, 28px), and a centered Deep Blue button with white label and Gold arrow, signature asymmetric radius.

templates.body: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

templates.description: Approved plug-and-play MJML for the Icon Callout Box: Light Blue accent-shape box (border-radius 40px 8px 40px 8px, padding-left clears the badge overhang), Brand Blue 800 text, and a white icon badge (80px, radius 20px 4px 20px 4px, drop shadow) absolutely positioned with its center on the box's left edge.

quotes: ## MJML
<mj-section background-color="#ffffff" padding="16px 25px">

templates.name: Icon Callout Box (MJML)
